title: Design System & Component Library
description: Build a documented, tested, and linted component library: Tailwind CSS v4 for styling, shadcn/ui for base components, Storybook for interactive docs, Vitest for unit tests, and ESLint for code quality.

steps.description: Configure Tailwind CSS v4 as the styling foundation
Install shadcn/ui to scaffold accessible base components
Add Storybook for interactive component documentation and visual testing
Set up Vitest for component unit tests alongside Storybook stories
Configure ESLint flat config to enforce consistent code style across components
